name: biomedical-agent-teams
description: BMAT for Codex v1.1.0: a Codex-native biomedical workflow router with lead_decision artifacts, 10x/bulk omics manifests, Compact/Full tiers, Codex adapter scaffolds, privacy-aware tool ledgers, golden eval gates, and validator-backed bundles.

interface.shortDescription: BMAT for Codex 1.1.0: lead-routed biomedical audit, 10x/bulk omics, adapter, loop, and validator workflows.
interface.longDescription: BMAT for Codex v1.1.0 is a Codex-native biomedical workflow suite for structured life-science research. It uses a lightweight SKILL.md router with lazy-loaded command recipes, runtime capability preflight, source corpus lock, lead_decision.json routing evidence, fixed-field claim ledger, tool-use/result integration, privacy-aware tool-call ledgers, research overview synthesis, hypothesis tournament checks, public-omics routing, 10x and bulk RNA-seq omics_run_manifest.json v2 contracts, Compact/Full tier handling, local bmat_codex_adapter.py scaffolds, immuno-oncology domain-pack boundaries, experiment-design and translational-scout workflows, loop-state validation, selective reviewer lanes, dependency-aware team DAG outputs, post-write validation, golden-case eval gates for PMID drift, contradiction, overclaim, ranking honesty, semantic scope, omics provenance, privacy, and runtime mismatch, and validator-backed artifact checks with JSON fix_hint guidance and explicit downgrade handling.
defaultPrompt: biomedical-research-council TET2 KO plus IL-21 armored CAR-T persistence hypothesis
omics-analysis-team --tier compact --track bulk-rnaseq find public datasets to test IL-21-STAT3-FOXO1 stem-like memory signatures
omics-analysis-team --tier full --track tenx-gex audit a 10x single-cell report for Cell Ranger provenance, donor-aware pseudobulk, ambient RNA, and doublet gates
